message:
test(ftui-render): improve diff.rs test coverage for compute_dirty and tile diff (bd-khkj4)

Add 20 new tests covering dirty span scanning, tile+span combination,
TileDiffPlan field access, DenseTiles threshold boundary, span_diagnostics
helper, and edge cases (single-row/column buffers, ChangeRun max values,
adjacent tile boundaries). Test count 1573 → 1593.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
